THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALAH, GHALEB RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ORO MILANO JEWELRY FALAH, GHALEB $4,006.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,058.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2004 - APPELLANT/DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT IS HEARD 30JAN04, D-525; THE MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE THE COURT'S JUDGMENT ORDERED & ENTERED ON 17DEC2003 IS DENIED & THE JUDGMENT STANDS AFFIRMED.
